interaction_phrase: led by the Institute of Materials Science (ICMUV) of the University of
occurrence_sentence: A new optical quantum switch with ultra-fast switching times and very low energy consumption may be useful in quantum computers and other forms of quantum technologies, according to An international team led by the Institute of Materials Science (ICMUV) of the University of Valencia.

interaction_phrase: published its findings in the journal Communications Physics, of the Nature Publishing
occurrence_sentence: The team, coordinated by Guillermo Muñoz Matutano, recently reinstated to ICMUV, has published its findings in the journal Communications Physics, of the Nature Publishing Group.
